message:
fix: validate Slack webhook URL before test/save (#8874) (#8892)

The Slack notification webhook URL field accepted any text. Clicking
Test would POST to an arbitrary URL because the only check was
non-empty.

Add a strict client-side regex check that:
- Validates on every change and shows an inline error below the input.
- Returns early in handleTestSlack if the URL is invalid.
- Disables the Test button while urlError is set.
- Wires aria-invalid / aria-describedby + role=alert for screen readers.

Pattern matches Slack's documented incoming webhook format:
https://hooks.slack.com/services/<token>

Adds one i18n key: settings.notifications.slack.invalidWebhookUrl.

Fixes #8874

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -385,7 +385,8 @@
         "testNotification": "Test Slack Notification",
         "configureFirst": "Please configure Slack webhook URL first",
         "testSuccess": "Test notification sent successfully!",
-        "testFailed": "Failed to send test notification"
+        "testFailed": "Failed to send test notification",
+        "invalidWebhookUrl": "Enter a valid Slack webhook URL (https://hooks.slack.com/services/...)."
       },
       "email": {
         "title": "Email Integration",
